message: I'm Cara. I once traveled with Sunny. Want to hear about it?
Help me with one thing and I'll share a rumor about Sunny.

Jasia, my daughter -- your sister Sunny has vanished. Find her, by any path. Begin in the castle dungeon.
Find Sunny. Visit every region. Come back when she's safe.
